description: Joel Bamford was appointed Executive Director for Mergers at the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) on 12 February 2024. On 1 July 2024 he became Executive Director for Mergers, Office for the Internal Market and Subsidy Advice Unit. Joel is a member of the senior executive team and the Board, and leads the mergers function to ensure that the CMA delivers an efficient and robust merger control regime. Joel is also the executive lead for the Office for the Internal Market and the Subsidy Advice Unit supporting the effective operation of the UK Internal Market and the UK’s subsidy control regime. Previous career highlights include: Director, Fingleton Senior Director for Mergers (CMA) (previously Director) Advocacy Manager, New Zealand Commerce Commission Economic Advisor, UK Government Executive Director for Mergers, Office for the Internal Market and Subsidy Advice Unit The Executive Director for Mergers, Office for the Internal Market and Subsidy Advice Unit at the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) is responsible for: providing strong, visible leadership across the organisation strategic leadership of the CMA’s merger control regime, Office for the Internal Market and the Subsidy Advice Unit Disclosure of interests

details.body:
Joel Bamford was appointed Executive Director for Mergers at the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) on 12 February 2024. On 1 July 2024 he became Executive Director for Mergers, Office for the Internal Market and Subsidy Advice Unit.

Joel is a member of the senior executive team and the Board, and leads the mergers function to ensure that the CMA delivers an efficient and robust merger control regime. Joel is also the executive lead for the Office for the Internal Market and the Subsidy Advice Unit supporting the effective operation of the UK Internal Market and the UK’s subsidy control regime.

Previous career highlights include:

  • Director, Fingleton
  • Senior Director for Mergers (CMA) (previously Director)
  • Advocacy Manager, New Zealand Commerce Commission
  • Economic Advisor, UK Government

Executive Director for Mergers, Office for the Internal Market and Subsidy Advice Unit

The Executive Director for Mergers, Office for the Internal Market and Subsidy Advice Unit at the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) is responsible for:

  • providing strong, visible leadership across the organisation
  • strategic leadership of the CMA’s merger control regime, Office for the Internal Market and the Subsidy Advice Unit

Disclosure of interests
